meaning: v.[鍖朷浠ユ哀澶勭悊,姘у寲
examples: The plants uptake more of the nitrogen and some oxygenate the water.
Oxygenate your body and calm your nervous system with full belly breathing.
Objective To investigate the antishock effect of oxygenate solution and its possible mechanism.
Ethanol, added to motor fuel, is a great oxygenate and can stretch gasoline supplies blended from 10 to 85 percent by volume.
